name: Lemon Lavender
desc: Meyer lemon zest meets culinary lavender in a brown-butter base. 47 test batches. Priya's personal favorite.

name: Pumpkin Spice Chai
desc: Real pumpkin purée, house-blended chai spices, and a maple glaze. Sold out in 4 days. We underestimated pumpkin people.

name: Peppermint Bark
desc: Dark chocolate base with crushed candy cane and a white chocolate drizzle. Holiday-only. Came with a tiny candy cane taped to the box.

name: Cherry Blossom
desc: Sakura-infused dough with dried cherries and a matcha drizzle. Made in collaboration with Yuki's Tokyo patisserie. Our first international collab.

name: Maple Pecan Crunch
desc: Vermont maple syrup, candied pecans, and a brown butter base with flaky salt. Marcus's recipe. Won our internal blind taste test 11-1.

name: Gingerbread Stout
desc: Molasses, fresh ginger, and a splash of local stout beer in the dough. Finished with a stout glaze. Developed with a Portland brewery.

name: Strawberry Basil
desc: Freeze-dried strawberries and fresh basil in a vanilla bean dough. Our very first seasonal flavor. Sold out in 48 hours.

name: Hot Honey Cornbread
desc: Cornmeal cookie with hot honey drizzle and a hint of lime zest. Sweet, spicy, and utterly unexpected. Diego's brainchild.
